# Commit Conventions

- Use concise imperative subjects: "Add", "Fix", "Refactor", "Update"
- Conventional commit prefixes encouraged: `feat:`, `fix:`, `refactor:`, `docs:`, `test:`, `chore:`
- Keep subject line under 72 characters
- All quality gates (`composer preflight`) must pass before committing
- Run `composer cs:fix` before committing to ensure PSR-12 compliance
